shortDescription: We operate a repair and maintenance facility on {TGT_SYSTEM.name}.  This base is critical to our operations in the system, and we suspect that {TEAM_TAR.FactionDef.Demonym} forces are going to assault the facility.  We'd like you to garrison the base, and if an attack comes, hold off the assault until our forces can arrive and relieve you.
longDescription: You don't hire mercenaries on a whim. They know there's an attack incoming, and we're going to absorb it. Thankfully, all we need to do is hold out.

dialogueContent.words: Pre-deployment... {COMPANY.CompanyName}, this is {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Demonym} Control. You are cleared for hot drop. {TEAM_TAR.FactionDef.Demonym} signatures inbound fast. Brace for atmospheric interference: trajectory deviation detected, correcting...
Control, this is {MC.PlayerLances.TeamPilot_Position_1.DisplayName}, I'm on the ground near the facility perimeter. Systems green. Anyone else intact?

{MC.PlayerLances.TeamPilot_Position_4.DisplayName} here; dropped not far from you, {MC.PlayerLances.TeamPilot_Position_1.DisplayName}. Took some dings on landing but I'm operational...nothing that buffing and a paint job won't fix.
{MC.PlayerLances.TeamPilot_Position_3.DisplayName} reporting --- came down off-target. I've got both of you on my sensors, but I'm not close enough to support immediately.
...{MC.PlayerLances.TeamPilot_Position_2.DisplayName} here. Damn it --- I got thrown WAY off. Navigating terrain now.

That drop was worse than expected.  Listen carefully: your mission has NOT changed.

You are to DEFEND THE REPAIR FACILITY.  This base is critical.  {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Demonym} forces are en route but delayed.
You heard them.  We hold this ground, no matter how scattered we are.
The {TEAM_EMP.FactionDef.Demonym} reinforcements have secured the site, Commander.  Good work.
This is bad, Commander.  I'm pulling the plug on this mission.
Commander, Target_Lance_01b has entered the AO.
Contact!  Verified signatures --- {TEAM_TAR.FactionDef.Demonym} lance approaching!
Form defensive positions!  Don't let them reach the facility!

{COMPANY.CompanyName}, be advised, new enemy reinforcements detected entering your AO.  Repeat, another opfor inbound.

You must continue to defend the facility at all costs.  Relief forces are still en route.
Of course they sent more...
No fallback.  No retreat.  We hold here.
Enemy vanguard lance down!
Good shooting, but don't celebrate yet.
Splash another one!
Whoo hoo!
Commander, the facilities' defenses are destroyed.

{MC.Modification.AddTo.EncounterTags.KilledAllOpfor}Enemies neutralized!  That was the last one!

They hit us hard...but we're still standing.
